description: Create a fully-constrained 2D architectural cross-section of a custom cove molding in SolveSpace as a single continuous loop. The profile consists of a 90 mm vertical back wall starting at (0,0), a 60 mm horizontal ceiling edge, a 10 mm vertical top drop, a 10 mm horizontal top step, a 10 mm horizontal bottom step from (0,0), and a 10 mm vertical bottom rise. Connect the top of the bottom rise to the inner edge of the top step with a concave circular arc. The arc must be tangent to the vertical bottom rise line and the sketch must be fully defined without an explicit radius dimension. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/cove_molding.slvs.
